TE Pipeline Conditions for 3/12/2026


Notice Text:

For Gas Day March 12, 2026, Texas Eastern (TE) has approved and scheduled nominations at each pipeline segment and meter station up to TE's operational capacity. The following locations have been restricted due to requested nominations exceeding TE's operational capacity:

TABS Pool Restrictions - Tolerances ETX STX WLA ELA M1-24" M1-30" M2-24" M2-30" M3
TABS Pool - Length 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000
TABS Pool - Short 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000 1% or 1,000











No-Notice Restrictions




















OFO / Imbalance Notice









OFO ---








Action Alert No DS - M2-24, M2-30 and M3 effective 3/10/2026.  Tolerance 4% / 250 Dth





Customer Specific OFO ---








Imbalance Warnings Stay Balanced - Access Area, M1-24 and M1-30

















FERC Order 698 M2-24, M2-30 and M3











Systemwide Notes:


Shippers in Texas Eastern's Access Area Zones and Market Area Zones M1-24 and M1-30 are required to coordinate any imbalance payback through TE's account representative and actual payback quantities may be limited depending on system operations and conditions. If customers do not adhere to imbalance requirements stated above, TE will utilize any provision of its tariff to ensure system integrity including the issuance of customer specific or system wide OFOs.











Due to the 30" planned maintenance, beginning Gas Day March 11, 2026, TE anticipates restrictions of approximately 5-15% of P1 nominations at Danville.  For future gas days TE will continue to monitor system conditions associated with the posted planned outages along the 30" system. 











Additionally, due to large daily DS imbalances, beginning Gas Day March 10, 2026, excess injections on all ISS-1, FSS-1, SS-1 and SS contracts will be restricted as well as TT16, TT17, no-notice balancing and no-notice pre-injection.  











Operational advisory for shippers nominating from 79503:  TETLP will upper limit to -0- certain activities if shippers (1) have initial nominations originating from 79503 (WLA TABS Pool) for delivery west of EGP at the Timely Cycle and (2) these shippers are consistently reducing these quantities intraday.  TE will be reviewing these activities at the Timely Cycle beginning Gas Day January 30, 2026 until further notice.











(1) Beginning Gas Day December 4, 2025 TETCO will begin restricting delivery nominations at MR 74215 - TEXAS GAS TRANSMISSION LLC - LEBANON, OH to the designed meter capacity of 250,000 Dth/d. 
Due to gas quality issues, meter 76609 has been shut in and physical receipts at the meter will be unavailable until further notice.  Beginning during the Timely cycle for Gas Day December 6, 2025, and until further notice, TE will restrict receipt nominations at Meter 76609 to -0- Dth/d.











TETLP is monitoring nominations through Gillis and Opelousas and may need to make restrictions in the event the system is at its operational capacity at these stations.











Due to current TETLP system operating conditions and limited capacity on lateral 15-H, TE is scheduling receipt nominations to approximately 220,000 Dth/d at meter 75660 - UGI APPALACHIA -DRY RIDGE-GREENE CO.,PA(D)73660/(R)73661 until further notice.  TETLP will continue to monitor system operations and nominated receipt volumes for future gas days.  











If customers/point operators do not manage hourly takes from the system, it will lead to delivery pressures being lower than desired for this area. As a result, TE may be required to impose further restrictions or courses of action in order to maintain the operational integrity of the system, including but not limited to, implementation of flow control at specific delivery meter locations.











TE may be required to issue hourly OFO's to impose further restrictions in order to maintain the operational integrity of the system.











Please contact your Operations Account Representative should you have any questions.


BackPrint
